title: 3D Vanilla Lite
description: Performance friendly version of the 3D Vanilla Resource Pack
body:
This resource pack is a varient of the [3D Vanilla resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3dvanilla), focused on improving performance to support lower end devices. More specifically, the _Lite_ version of the pack removes models such Grass, Vines, Bamboo, Kelp etc. which are dense in certain biomes and can greatly reduce performance.

The original resource pack can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3dvanilla).
